g.text: every non-trivial change is a GitHub Issue · 7-stage label-tracked lifecycle · closes on release
WHERE EACH STAGE ANCHORS IN THE PIPELINE BELOW
↓ Release cycle § GitHub Release publish · closes #N
push → build → operator install → smoke test → ASK approval
path filter: only changed services fire
tag vX.Y.Z → release.yml builds customer images → customers consume
Customer consumes — installer is the ONLY upgrade path
pulls vX.Y.Z images — access granted by gh release create
all 5 stack images + 6 connector images ship in lockstep at the same vX.Y.Z — mixed-version manifests NOT supported
classify the change before planning a release · same for dev prereleases and customer releases
• Pulls newer images · same major version
installer/** change — new step, env var,
SecretStore KDF change · db schema migration
access is per IMAGE VERSION, not per package — versions inherit from their associated GitHub Release
three rollback flavors + cross-cutting factory reset · operator yank for bad releases
no source change → NO new image · NO new release tag · same digest retagged from prev release
PATH FILTERS — UNTOUCHED SERVICES NEVER REBUILD OR RETAG
emitted by build-dev-installer.yml on every run
digest matches prior dev-latest — workflow did NOT fire this run · container won't recreate
digest changed — source under this service's path filter changed · container recreated
updater/browser only — latest customer release advanced since last dev run
Local-mirrors-customer · CI builds, operator installs, approval gates customer releases · base-image digest pinning + path-filter narrowing eliminate unnecessary rebuilds
